flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arcadia University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.0k → $31.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arcadia University fell 92% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Arcadia University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).
